tips_en: Read Paper 1 first to understand the SNR‑t bias that underlies diffusion‑based generators, since its training‑free DCW correction can be directly applied to the diffusion planner in Paper 3, which also relies on diffusion trajectories; Paper 2 on agent benchmarks can be consulted later for evaluation insights but is less directly linked.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读第1篇，了解扩散模型中 SNR‑t 偏差的根本原因及其免训练、可即插即用的 DCW 方法，因为第3篇的扩散‑判别器运动规划器同样基于扩散生成轨迹，可直接受益于该偏差校正技术；第2篇关于 AI 代理评测基准的论文可稍后阅读，虽与前两篇关联不大，但对评估方法的系统化很有帮助。
